response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified 'Seiten Galaxy Cross' from on-screen text and audio. Searched for '"Seiten Galaxy Cross" Japanese and English lyrics'. 2. Identified 'Trio Dreams' from on-screen text ('Trio Dreams', '作詞:大森祥子', '作曲:馬瀬みさき'). Searched for '"Trio Dreams" Japanese and English lyrics'. 3. Extracted performer info directly from the context of virtual idol performances. Both songs had clear on-screen titles. Performer names were inferred from the visual representation and standard knowledge of these franchises.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed in a virtual concert setting by characters from different franchises (Symphogear and Pretty Cure). The clip starts with 'Seiten Galaxy Cross' and switches to 'Trio Dreams'.

scenes.description: Virtual characters perform 'Seiten Galaxy Cross' on stage. Title/artist information is displayed in the corners of the screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Maria Cadenzavna Eve and Tsubasa Kazanari

scenes.description: The performance transitions to 'Trio Dreams', featuring a different set of virtual characters. Song title and credits are shown on screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Cure Idol, Cure Wink, and Cure Kyun-Kyun
